name: Reciprocal Insurance Company Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Available to mutual insurance companies that are interinsurers or reciprocal underwriters where the attorney-in-fact is a corporation subject to IRC Section 11 and consents to specific reporting requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A mutual insurance company (reciprocal) can elect to be credited with the tax paid by its attorney-in-fact that is attributable to the income the attorney-in-fact received from the reciprocal.
